## Checklist

- [ ] I used a Conventional Commit style title or commit message.
- [ ] I added or updated tests where useful.
- [ ] I updated docs or examples if behavior changed.
- [ ] I checked that no secrets, API keys, tokens, or local config values are included.
- [ ] CI passes locally or in GitHub Actions.
